ADGUARD_ADMIN_PORT.description: AdGuard Home admin web UI port (avoid 80 to leave it free for NPM)

ADGUARD_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: AdGuard Home admin password — auto-generated, shown in install log so first login works without going through the setup wizard.

ADGUARD_ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH.description: Bcrypt hash of ADGUARD_ADMIN_PASSWORD — written into AdGuardHome.yaml so AdGuard accepts the auto-generated password on first start.

ADGUARD_SUBDOMAIN.description: Subdomain for AdGuard Home admin — gated by Authelia forward-auth. AdGuard itself binds on 127.0.0.1, so the only way in is via SSO. Local AdGuard credentials remain as a recovery backstop when reached from the host loopback.
